userStories.title: Project resolver with CWD and -d flag support
userStories.description: Create src/commands/common.ts with resolveProject(options) function. Resolution order: 1) -d flag path, 2) CWD if it contains nax/ directory, 3) Error with helpful message. Validate: nax/ exists, nax/config.json exists. If -f flag given, validate nax/features/<name>/ exists. Return resolved {projectDir, configPath, featureDir?}. This is shared by status, logs, and future CLI commands.
acceptanceCriteria: resolveProject() returns projectDir when CWD has nax/ directory
Throws descriptive error when no nax/ directory found
Validates nax/config.json exists in resolved directory
When feature specified, validates nax/features/<name>/ exists
Error message lists available features when feature not found
Works with both relative and absolute -d paths
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: balanced
Attempt 2 failed with model tier: balanced

userStories.title: Human-friendly logging formatter with verbosity levels
userStories.description: Create src/logging/formatter.ts and src/logging/types.ts. Transform JSONL entries into human-readable output with emoji indicators. Support 4 modes: quiet, normal, verbose, json. Include run header, story progress with tree-style output, stage results with emoji, retry indicators, run summary footer.
acceptanceCriteria: formatLogEntry renders story start with title, complexity, tier
formatLogEntry renders stage results with appropriate emoji
quiet mode only shows pass/fail + summary
verbose mode includes routing, tokens, context files
json mode passes through raw JSONL
Timestamps formatted in local timezone HH:MM:SS

userStories.title: status.json writer for live run state
userStories.description: Create src/logging/status-writer.ts. Maintain status.json at nax/features/<feature>/status.json during runs. Write on: run start (runId, feature, totalStories, pid), story start (currentStory), story complete (status/duration/cost/commit), run end (completed/failed + totals). Atomic writes via tmp+rename.
acceptanceCriteria: status.json created at run start with runId, feature, startedAt, pid, status=running
Status changes to completed/failed at run end
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: balanced

userStories.title: nax status command with active run detection
userStories.description: Create src/commands/status.ts, register in CLI. Uses resolveProject(). Show feature table (done/failed/pending, last run, cost). Detect active run via status.json+PID. Detect crash via status.json+dead PID. Support -f for single feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows table of all features with counts and last run
Detailed single-feature view with story table
Active run detected via PID alive check
Crashed run shows warning with recovery hints
No status.json shows No runs yet

userStories.title: nax logs command with filtering and follow mode
userStories.description: Create src/commands/logs.ts, register in CLI. Uses resolveProject(). Supports: default (latest run formatted), --follow (tail -f), --story (filter), --level (filter), --list (run table), --run (specific run), --json (raw). Uses formatter from US-002.

userStories.title: Integrate formatter into headless runner
userStories.description: Modify src/execution/runner.ts to use formatter for headless stdout instead of raw JSONL. Default=normal. Add --quiet/--verbose/--json flags to nax run. Wire status-writer into run loop. JSONL still written to disk. Integrate status.json updates at lifecycle points.
acceptanceCriteria: Headless stdout shows formatted output by default
Run header with version, feature, count, path

userStories.title: Crash recovery with signal handlers heartbeat and exit summary
userStories.description: Add SIGTERM/SIGINT/SIGHUP handlers and uncaught exception handlers. On signal: write fatal JSONL + update status.json to crashed + exit. During agent execution: heartbeat every 60s. On normal exit: write exit summary entry.
acceptanceCriteria: Signal handlers write fatal log with signal name
Signal handlers update status.json to crashed
Uncaught exceptions write fatal log with stack
Heartbeat timer cleaned up on story completion
